answer_en:
Tibialis Posterior m.
Origin: Posterior surface of tibia below soleal line, posterior surface of fibula, and interosseus membrane
Insertion: Tuberosity of navicular, medial cuneiform, intermediate cuneiform, lateral cuneiform, cuboid, and bases of metatarsals 2-4

details: Origin: Posterior surface of tibia below soleal line, posterior surface of fibula, and interosseus membrane
Insertion: Tuberosity of navicular, medial cuneiform, intermediate cuneiform, lateral cuneiform, cuboid, and bases of metatarsals 2-4

title: Posterior View of Leg (Right Side)
subtitle: (Superficial Muscles Removed)
